MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KRIS COX, ESQ. of Moscone Emblidge & Otis LLP, Tel No. 415-362-3599 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. KELLY C. SLOAN, ESQ. of Lanak & Hanna, P.C., Tel No. 714-620-2350 appearing telephonically for Defendants Keenan Hopkins Suder & Stowell Contractors, Inc.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KEENAN HOPKINS SUDER & STOWELL CONTRACTORS, INC.'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KRIS COX, ESQ. of Moscone Emblidge & Otis LLP, Tel No. 415-362-3599 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. KELLY C. SLOAN, ESQ. of Lanak & Hanna, P.C., Tel No. 714-620-2350 appearing telephonically for Defendants Keenan Hopkins Suder & Stowell Contractors, Inc.

RULING - Matter was not argued. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KEENAN HOPKINS SUDER & STOWELL CONTRACTORS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Taking all material facts pleaded as true, Sheehan v. San Francisco 49ers, Ltd. (2009) 45 Cal.4th 992, 998, Plaintiff states facts sufficient to constitute a cause of action. (Code Civ. Pro. Sec. 431.10(e).) Plaintiff alleges: (1) Plaintiff and Defendant entered into a contract; (2) Defendant breached the contract by misrepresenting that the inspector rejected Plaintiff's work; and (3) Defendant has been harmed in an amount in excess of $250,000. (See Complaint 10, 25, 35.) That Defendant is withholding any payment from Plaintiff on the basis that Defendant must recoup for its own losses is sufficient to constitute a cause of action. (Code Civ. Pro. Sec. 431.10(e).) Defendant's position that Plaintiff would not leave a work area until it passed inspection does not properly address Plaintiff's allegation that Defendant misrepresented whether Plaintiff passed inspection. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
